title: cymbopogon exsertus
intro: Cymbopogon exsertus, also known as Java citronella grass, is a species of tropical grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cymbopogon exsertus include its ability to repel insects, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of fever and digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the essential oil extracted from this plant is often used in aromatherapy, and it can be found in various commercial products, such as soaps, candles, and perfumes.
